name: grove
description: Workspace management for Codex using the grove CLI and workspace-aware skills.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Grove workspaces and worktrees from Codex
interface.longDescription: CLI-first Grove workflows for Codex. Reuses Grove skills to inspect workspaces, create worktrees, and steer the agent toward `grove ws ...` commands instead of raw `git worktree` calls.
defaultPrompt: Show me the active Grove workspace context
Create a new Grove worktree for this repo
List the worktrees available in this Grove workspace
